samples.text: All birds are animals. A sparrow is a bird. Therefore, is a sparrow an animal?
Every bird belongs to the category of animals. A sparrow is classified as a bird. Does this mean a sparrow is an animal?
All avians are animals. A songbird is an avian. Therefore, is a songbird an animal?
A sparrow belongs to the group of birds. The group of birds falls under animals. Based on this, is a sparrow an animal?
All birds are animals. A sparrow is a bird. This topic was discussed last week. Therefore, is a sparrow an animal?
